text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That cheese my mom sent sure was<n>tasty...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It was so rich... Really gave me a craving<n>for some
fresh milk straight from the<n>cow...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's it! Trainer, what if we raised<n>dairy cows
on campus?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We could use the cow pies as fertilizer<n>for the
fields too! And while we're at it,<n>why don't we
raise some chickens and<n>pigs—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, wait, then I guess it'd be more of a<n>farm than
a school, huh...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Awww... I thought I had a pretty good<n>thing going
there...
